case_title: GALLIPEAU, GREGOIRE F. VS SPRINT INC. et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINT INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALLIPEAU, GREGOIRE F. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPRINT INC. DOLAN, SEAN MGR. $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $45.00, SEAN DOLAN IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT IS TO CREDIT PLAINTIFF'S ACCOUNT IN THE AMOUNT OF $81.14 PLUS COURT COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $518.14 FILED BY GALLIPEAU, GREGOIRE F. AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINT INC. DOLAN, SEAN MGR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
